existing_features.title: Increase the perceived brightness of text across the app by adjusting the global theme color tokens used for typography (at minimum: --foreground, --card-foreground, --popover-foreground, and --muted-foreground) in the active Tailwind base stylesheet (frontend/src/index.css). Ensure the change improves readability on top of the background image overlays and glass cards without breaking light/dark theme behavior.

new_feature_requests.summary: Make the text font color bright
